Sidebar Navigation

API Reference

system

GET Health check

auth

PUT Register a new API token

GET Fetch an API token

DELETE Delete an API token

products

PUT Create a product

GET Fetch a product

DELETE Delete a product

PUT Modify a product (addToken)

DELETE Modify a product (deleteVersion / deleteToken)

versions

POST Upload a version artifact

GET Download a version artifact

DELETE Delete a version artifact

Register a new API token​

PUT
/register

Creates and returns a new API token. Requires admin privileges.

Authorizations​

ApiKeyAuth

API token obtained via the /register endpoint. Pass as the X-Api-Token header on every request.

Type
API Key (header: X-Api-Token)

Request Body​

application/json
JSON
{
  
"admin": false
}

Responses​

Token created. The raw token string is returned as plain text.

text/plain
JSON
"a3f9b2c1d4e5f6a7b8c9..."
PUT
/register

Playground​

Authorization
Body

Samples​
